articles.title: Staking Could Make Ethereum ETFs More Competitive with Bitcoin
articles.description: Staking could play a pivotal role in enhancing the appeal of U.S.-based Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs), according to Tom Wan, a former crypto analyst at 21.co. The post Staking Could Make Ethereum ETFs More Competitive with Bitcoin appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF Surpasses Gold
articles.description: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF is now officially bigger than its famous Gold ETF. In just 10 short months, the Bitcoin ETF attracted a whopping $33.2 billion from investors, making it a massive success. articles.title: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF overtakes its Gold ETF in size
articles.description: BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) has surpassed its Gold ETF counterpart, the iShares Gold Trust (IAU), in assets under management (AUM). IBIT has amassed around $33.1 billion in AUM, overtaking IAU, which currently holds about $32.9 billion worth of assets.iShares Bitcoin Trust ETFiShares Gold TrustIBIT, launched in early 2024, accumulated more than $10 billion in assets within its...

articles.title: Risk-On ETFs Soar After Trump Win, Crypto Funds See Gains
articles.description: Risk-on ETFs see record inflows after Trump's win, with crypto funds like Bitcoin ETFs benefiting despite not leading the surge in gains.
